_meta.description: Ablation/reasoning profile pack for controlled experimentation. Each profile defines a named set of execution parameters (max_steps, tool_set, reasoning_style, safety_mode, token budget) that can be applied without modifying source code.

profiles.name: baseline
profiles.description: Unmodified default execution profile. All tools enabled, standard reasoning, no step cap.

profiles.name: minimal-tools
profiles.description: Ablation: removes all retrieval and memory tools. Only read_file, write_file, run_command allowed. Used to measure retrieval contribution.

profiles.name: no-retrieval
profiles.description: Ablation: disables AIDB/embedding retrieval. Tests model reliance on parametric memory vs vector search.

profiles.name: structured-reasoning
profiles.description: Forces explicit step-by-step reasoning traces. Prompts include structured XML-style thinking blocks. Useful for evaluating planning depth.
profiles.prompt_prefix: <thinking>Reason step by step before taking any action.</thinking>

profiles.name: minimal-reasoning
profiles.description: Suppresses chain-of-thought. Model produces direct output without reasoning traces. Tests impact of explicit reasoning.

profiles.name: research-mode
profiles.description: Research-friendly profile: read-only tool set, high token budget, structured reasoning, strict safety. Suitable for analysis tasks without side-effects.

profiles.name: low-budget
profiles.description: Extreme budget constraint: 2048 tokens, 10 steps, minimal tools. Tests performance under severe resource limits.

profiles.name: high-temperature
profiles.description: Ablation: raises temperature to 0.9 to test stochastic vs deterministic reasoning quality delta.
